hero.name: Syah Putra Nugraha
hero.role: Full Stack Web Developer | Frontend Developer | Backend Developer
hero.title: Building Digital Experiences with Precision.
hero.subtitle: Specialist in web application development, work system digitalization, with 8+ years background in IT.

about.title: About Me
about.summary:
Full Stack Web Developer with experience building web applications based on React.js, Node.js, Express.js, PHP, MySQL, MongoDB, and PostgreSQL. Has an 8+ year background in IT, business process digitalization, project administration, manufacturing, and construction.

Experienced in creating REST APIs, authentication systems, admin dashboards, monitoring applications, company profile websites, and internal systems. Familiar with the entire lifecycle from requirement analysis to deployment and maintenance. Currently focusing on returning to a career as a Frontend, Backend, or Full Stack Developer.
about.soft_skills: Problem Solving, Adaptability, Teamwork, Analytical Thinking, Communication, Client Handling, Project Coordination, Documentation, Time Management

exp1.desc: Developing websites and web applications for SMEs and local businesses using React.js and Node.js. Creating REST APIs, JWT-based login systems, and admin dashboards. Implementing responsive design and basic SEO optimization.

exp2.desc: Digitalizing daily, weekly, and monthly project reports. Preparing RAB, RAP, invoices, material reports, and project documentation. Coordinating with field teams, foremen, and main contractors.

exp3.role: Personal Assistant & General Staff — Digital Documentation
exp3.desc: Developing digital-based archiving and logistics reporting systems. Helped improve documentation efficiency by approximately 25% through simple digital report systems.

exp4.desc: Created company profile website for digital promotion. Provided light support for computer hardware and internal IT needs.

exp5.desc: Managed factory servers, networks, CCTV, and IT devices. Developed web-based internal recruitment applications. Designed employee databases and admin dashboards.

proj1.title: Construction Project Monitoring Application
proj1.subtitle: Rumahku Kontraktor
proj1.desc: Web application for monitoring house construction progress. Key features include progress dashboards, daily reports, project documentation, and job monitoring.
proj1.impact: Helped improve project reporting efficiency by about 35%.
proj1.challenge: Difficulty in monitoring daily progress in real-time across multiple construction sites.
proj1.solution: Built a cloud-based reporting system that allows foremen to upload reports directly from the field.
proj1.features: Progress Dashboard, Photo Uploads, Digital Daily Reports, Logistics Management.

proj2.title: Event Organizer Showcase Website
proj2.subtitle: Siqah
proj2.desc: Promotion website for event organizer and catering services with service catalogs, event portfolios, and inquiry/booking features.
proj2.impact: Increased client trust and expanded the business's digital reach.
proj2.challenge: Lack of digital presence to attract high-end clients in the EO industry.
proj2.solution: Premium website design with interactive portfolio galleries and dynamic service catalogs.
proj2.features: Portfolio Gallery, Inquiry Services, Catering Package Catalog, Mobile Responsive.

proj3.title: Internal Recruitment Application
proj3.subtitle: PT. OTICS Indonesia
proj3.desc: Internal system for managing applicant data and HR dashboard.
proj3.impact: Sped up the recruitment process and reduced administrative data errors.
proj3.challenge: Manual management of thousands of applicant records that was error-prone and slow.
proj3.solution: Automated applicant archiving and created a recruitment status monitoring dashboard.
proj3.features: Applicant Database, Status Filters, HR Dashboard, Data Export.

proj4.title: Company Profile Website
proj4.subtitle: Wisata Ngaprak Bandung
proj4.desc: Company profile website to showcase business profile, services, and destination gallery.
proj4.impact: Helped strengthen the company's digital presence.
proj4.challenge: Tourist service information was decentralized and difficult for customers to access.
proj4.solution: Built an informative digital information hub with attractive destination visuals.
proj4.features: Destination Info, Photo Gallery, Google Maps Integration, Quick Contact.
